# Zikit.ai — AI-Powered Website Change Monitoring

## What is Zikit?
Zikit is a website change monitoring tool that uses AI to detect and summarize changes on any public webpage. Instead of showing raw diffs, Zikit explains what changed in plain English — like "Competitor dropped prices by 15%" or "New job posting added for Senior Engineer."

## How it works
1. Add any URL you want to monitor
2. Zikit checks the page automatically (daily, hourly, or every 15 minutes)
3. When something changes, you get an AI-powered summary via email, Slack, Discord, Telegram, or webhook
4. A built-in AI chat assistant (Camo) helps you understand changes and take action

## Key features
- AI-powered change summaries (not raw diffs)
- Smart noise filtering (ignores timestamps, cookie banners, ad rotations)
- Built-in AI chat assistant
- Email, Slack, Discord, Telegram, and webhook alerts
- CSS selector targeting (monitor specific page sections)
- Keyword monitoring (alert only when specific words appear/disappear)
- Change importance scoring (1-10)
- Semantic change detection using embeddings
- Supports websites, JSON APIs, PDF documents, RSS/Atom feeds

## Pricing
- Free: 3 monitors, daily checks, email alerts, AI summaries — no time limit
- Pro ($19/month): 20 monitors, hourly checks, Slack + email alerts, CSS selectors, 90-day history
- Business ($49/month): 100 monitors, 15-minute checks, API access, custom webhooks, 365-day history

## Use cases
- Competitor pricing monitoring
- Regulatory and compliance tracking
- Job posting monitoring
- E-commerce price tracking
- News and content monitoring
- Legal document change tracking

## Technical details
- Built with Next.js, deployed on Vercel
- Database: PostgreSQL (Supabase)
- AI: OpenAI GPT-4o-mini for summaries, text-embedding-3-small for semantic comparison
- Billing: Paddle (Merchant of Record)
- Email: Resend

## Contact
- Website: https://zikit.ai
- Support: support@zikit.ai
